name: Strawberry Daiquiri (frozen)
title: Strawberry Daiquiri (frozen) Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Strawberry Daiquiri (frozen) | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A frozen strawberry daiquiri made with BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, lime juice, simple syrup, strawberries, and crushed ice.
marketing_description: Bring on the summertime vibes with a Frozen Strawberry Daiquiri, a sweeter take on the traditional daiquiri cocktail.

steps: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Add 1 cup of crushed ice and blend until a slushy consistency forms.
Serve in individual coupettes or tall cocktail glasses.

glassware: individual coupettes or tall cocktail glasses
raw_text_excerpt: Ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum 25 ml fresh lime juice 25 ml simple syrup (1:1) 6 strawberries 1 cup(s) crushed ice single strawberry as garnish ... Step 1 Combine all ingredients in a blender. Step 2 Blend Add 1 cup of crushed ice and blend until a slushy consistency forms. Step 3 Serve in individual coupettes or tall cocktail glasses. Step 4 Garnish with a single strawberry.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make the best Frozen Strawberry Daiquiri Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ recipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
